data.title: DYdX Community Votes To Delist DMAIL-USD Trading Pair
data.description: According to Foresight News, the dYdX community has voted in favor of a proposal to delist the DMAIL-USD trading pair and disable it in Marketmap. The proposal received a support rate of 92.87%.

data.title: Binance will adjust the settlement frequency of BANUSDT perpetual contract funding rate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Binance, starting from 16:00 (Beijing time) on February 24, 2025, Binance will adjust the funding rate settlement frequency of USDⓈ-M BANUSDT perpetual contract from once every four hours to once every two hours. The maximum funding rate range remains unchanged between +3.00% and -3.00%. The announcement pointed out that in order to guard against the risk of extreme market volatility, Binance may take additional protective measures without further notice, including adjusting the maximum leverage multiple, position value, maintenance margin ratio, updating the funding rate composition, adjusting the price index composition, etc.

data.title: Bybit Purchases $742 Million ETH After $1.4B Hack, ETH Price Recovers 6%
data.description:
The post Bybit Purchases $742 Million ETH After $1.4B Hack, ETH Price Recovers 6% appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Bybit has taken a bold step after suffering one of the biggest hacks in crypto history. Following the massive $1.4 billion security breach, the exchange has reportedly purchased $742 million of Ethereum (ETH) to recover from the attack. This has made the ETH price recover...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/bybit-purchases-742-million-eth-after-1-4b-hack-eth-price-recovers-6/

data.title: Bybit CEO says exchange has closed shortfall in ETH reserves, plans to release audited POR report
data.description:
Bybit plans to release an audited proof of reserves report to verify that it has restored its client assets on a one-to-one basis.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342896/bybit-ceo-says-exchange-has-closed-shortfall-in-eth-reserves-plans-to-release-audited-por-report?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Infini Faces Security Breach Due To Retained Admin Access
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cyvers Alerts has reported that Infini experienced a security breach due to a hacker secretly retaining administrative access. The hacker operated from the address 0xc49b5e5b9da66b9126c1a62e9761e6b2147de3e1, which was initially involved in developing the contract as part of the Infini project. However, after the project's completion, the hacker covertly maintained administrator privileges.

data.title: Berachain TVL surpasses Base and ranks sixth
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DeFiLlama data, Berachain TVL reached 3.271 billion US dollars, surpassing Base's TVL (3.27 billion US dollars) and ranking sixth among all chains.

data.title: Bybit stolen funds likely headed to crypto mixers next: Elliptic
data.description:
Based on past behavior, the Lazarus Group could start using mixers to obfuscate the stolen funds, but it may prove more challenging this time due to the sheer volume of stolen assets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bybit-stolen-funds-likely-headed-crypto-mixers-next-elliptic?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Ft%3D1740376364853&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
